title: [supervisor] Build durable failure-signature learning system
objective: Turn repeated CI failures into durable learning: define signature taxonomy, ICM storage rules, `.handoff/pr-repair/lessons` projection, replay/recall workflow, and noise controls so recurring failures become repair playbooks instead of chat-only notes.
acceptance_criteria: A failure-signature schema captures repo/check/command/root-cause/affected PRs/fix/playbook/confidence/staleness.
Confirmed repeated/root-caused failures are stored in ICM with stable keywords and projected into `.handoff/pr-repair/lessons` when useful.
Transient logs are not stored as durable memory unless reduced to a reusable signature.
Supervisor classification consults prior signatures before creating duplicate lanes.
At least one existing envctl gates signature is migrated or validated against the schema.

source_gap_audit.reason: Expanded from .handoff/.idea intent after the initial TASK-PRR set proved too broad.
